title: Machaonia havanensis

This plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its potential health benefits, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which may aid in the treatment of wounds, fever, and respiratory issues. The bioactive constituents of Machaonia havanensis include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and terpenes, which contribute to its medicinal properties. Traditionally, Machaonia havanensis is used to make herbal teas and infusions, as well as tinctures and extracts, which are utilized in various folk remedies.
